<<<KOT:pentastomid>>>>
{"kind":"cannot-formalise","why":"A pentastomid is a parasitic arthropod taxon whose identity depends on cladistic classification and microscopic anatomy (e.g., hook morphology, body segmentation, crustacean-derived traits). The everyday sense does not exist: the term is a technical zoological category requiring phylogenetic grounding outside the prime lexicon and catalog. It belongs to the specialist taxonomy sector, not the Kernel of Truth tier."}
<<<END:pentastomid>>>>

<<<KOT:pneumoencephalogram>>>>
{"kind":"cannot-formalise","why":"A pneumoencephalogram is a medical image produced by a specific diagnostic procedure (pneumoencephalography) involving specialized radiological technique, contrast agents, and clinical interpretation. Its identity is bound to modern medical technology and pathophysiology not expressible in the prime lexicon. It is a technical medical artifact, not an everyday concept, and belongs to the medical/radiology sector."}
<<<END:pneumoencephalogram>>>>
